<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Framework\Constraint; use Countable; use PHPUnit\Framework\Exception; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final class SameSize extends Count { /** * @param Countable|iterable<mixed> $expected * * @throws Exception */ public function __construct(Countable|iterable $expected) { parent::__construct((int) $this->getCountOf($expected)); } }
